## Objective

What data, reliability, or operations problem needs to be solved?

## Context

What failed, changed, or needs to become more trustworthy?

## Scope

- Included:
- Excluded:

## Risk / Severity

Describe whether this affects source scraping, raw loading, staging,
analytics, API correctness, automation, deployment, or user-facing trust.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Relevant script, migration, validation, or workflow path is identified.
- [ ] Failure mode or data-quality risk is documented.
- [ ] Fix or investigation is verified with the relevant command.
- [ ] Logs, run summaries, or validation issues are updated if applicable.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when commands, secrets, workflow behavior, or escalation rules change.
